set.caption: Fig. 9.1 A summary of the initiation (left) and iteration (right) procedures for a Hartree–Fock self-consistent field calculation.

overrides.reason: 正文 ch09 body[63] 引用 Fig. 9.1；PDF 第 316 頁與圖檔 9ca655... 確認此 fallback 圖塊就是 Hartree–Fock SCF flowchart，只缺語意 id/caption。

block.caption: Fig. 8.26 The molecular orbitals of NH3 at its equilibrium bond angle of 107°. The energy levels are notional. The orbital depictions have been computed as described in Chapter 9, using a 3-21G* basis in the Hartree–Fock approximation.
